title: Rootless podman in Kubernetes with NFS additionalImageStore doesn't work
body:
### Issue Description

I run some container in a rootless podman within Kubernetes. With default settings it works without any error.
To not download images every time, I created an NFS share where podman could use images (`additionalimagestores`), but when I start a container with those images, I only see the latest layers content.


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Start a rootless podman in Kubernetes with FUSE attachment
2. podman --transient-store run -ti --rm docker.io/bellsoft/buildpacks.builder:musl
3. List contents of /cnb, that will be says that `No data available`


### Describe the results you received

The /cnb directory has contents, but I don't see in the running container.
```
$ podman --transient-store run -ti --rm docker.io/bellsoft/buildpacks.builder:musl ls -lah /cnb
ls: /cnb: No data available
```

### Describe the results you expected

Show the contents of the running image.
I run the image with Docker for show the expected result:
```
$ docker run -ti --rm docker.io/bellsoft/buildpacks.builder:musl ls -lah /cnb
total 36K
drwxr-xr-x    1 root     root        4.0K Nov 25 23:23 .
drwxr-xr-x    1 root     root        4.0K Nov 28 11:11 ..
drwxr-xr-x    3 root     root        4.0K Jan  1  1980 build-config
drwxr-xr-x    1 root     root        4.0K Nov 25 23:23 buildpacks
drwxr-xr-x    2 root     root        4.0K Jan  1  1980 extensions
drwxr-xr-x    2 root     root        4.0K Jan  1  1980 lifecycle
-rw-r--r--    1 root     root         190 Jan  1  1980 order.toml
-rw-r--r--    1 root     root          77 Jan  1  1980 run.toml
-rw-r--r--    1 root     root          78 Jan  1  1980 stack.toml
```

### Podman in a container

Yes

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

Here is the YAML Kubernetes manifest:
```yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: podman
  labels:
    app: podman
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: podman
  template:
    metadata:
      name: podman
      labels:
        app: podman
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        fsGroup: 1000
      restartPolicy: Always
      containers:
        - name: podman
          image: quay.io/podman/stable
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          command:
            - podman
          args:
            - system
            - service
            - --time=0
            - tcp://localhost:8888
          resources:
            limits:
              squat.ai/fuse: 1
          securityContext:
            privileged: false
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            seLinuxOptions:
              type: spc_t
            capabilities:
              add:
                - CAP_SETUID
                - CAP_SETGID
              drop:
                - ALL
          volumeMounts:
            - name: podman-image-cache
              mountPath: /opt/podman/image-storage
      volumes:
        - name: podman-image-cache
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: podman-image-cache
```

The mounted NFS volume in the rootless podman container:
```
10.1.87.4:/srv/hdd/data/volumes/default-podman-image-cache-pvc-00ad308a-0e86-4b42-9928-2f0c166bb44a on /opt/podman/image-storage type nfs4 (rw,relatime,vers=4.2,rsize=262144,wsize=262144,namlen=255,hard,proto=tcp,timeo=600,retrans=2,sec=sys,clientaddr=10.1.87.3,local_lock=none,addr=10.1.87.4)
```

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
